issues.detail: Skill examples lack coverage of error handling and edge cases.
Installation commands lack checksum verification, increasing risk of tampered packages.

scenarios.name: stream-parquet-batch-processing
scenarios.rationale: Both responses correctly use ParquetFile, iter_batches, and pc.filter, but neither computes mean; A is more direct and avoids unnecessary Table conversion, giving it a slight edge.

scenarios.name: arrow-ipc-python-js-interop
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A omits the required tableFromIPC usage.
